description: G11 - Exp Reclass HSIC to HEIC

sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update x set x.Flex1 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on x.CC = y.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'G11'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set BusCat = '98' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '99'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,CC,Flex1,BusCat,Contract,ProdCode,Txt,Amt1) (select KeyID,'2450' as Co,GL,Flex1,CC,BusCat,Contract,ProdCode,'Reclass from ' + CC + ' to ' + Flex1 + ' @[Yr]/[Mo]' as Txt,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1, Co = '2400', Txt = 'Reclass from ' + CC + ' to ' + Flex1 + ' @[Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,PC,CC,TP,BusCat,Contract,ProdCode,Txt,Amt1) (select KeyID,Co,'1999901' as GL,(case when co = '2400' then '4024000000' else '4030000000' end) as PC,'' as CC,(case when co = '2400' then '2450' else '2400' end) as TP,'' as BusCat,'' as Contract,'' as ProdCode,'Inter-co for HSIC to HEIC exp reclass @[Yr]/[Mo]' as Txt,round(sum(-Amt1),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update TransX set GL = '2899901' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901' and Amt1 < 0
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set TP = coalesce(TP,''), PC = coalesce(PC,''), Flex2 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
